name: Custom Loans
description_short: Custom Loans offers personal installment loans in Houston with flexible approval that doesn't automatically disqualify applicants with bad credit.
description_long:
Custom Loans operates as a personal installment loan provider serving the Houston, Texas area and surrounding communities. The company is part of Loan South Finance Corp and Phoenix Financial Holdings, Inc., both licensed NMLS entities (NMLS# 2031643 and NMLS# 2029924 respectively). They maintain a physical branch location at 4310 Old Spanish Trail, Suite A in Houston, positioned near the Houston Zoo and University of Houston area, serving customers not only from Houston but also from surrounding towns including Baytown, Missouri City, Sugarland, Pearland, Rosenberg, Humble, and Cleveland.

Custom Loans specializes in personal installment loans designed to help borrowers cover emergencies, unexpected expenses, and large purchases requiring cash upfront. They offer online loan applications and an e-loan platform, allowing customers to apply and make payments without visiting a physical branch. The company emphasizes accessibility, noting that bad credit does not automatically disqualify applicants from receiving a loan, positioning themselves as an option for borrowers with challenged credit histories.

The company distinguishes itself through operational convenience and physical accessibility. Their Houston location features a spacious parking lot, wheelchair-accessible entrance and seating areas, and extended business hours (Monday-Friday, 8:30 AM–5:30 PM). They offer both in-person and online service options, allowing customers flexibility in how they interact with the company. Their service area extends across multiple surrounding towns through their online and e-loan platform.

Custom Loans operates in the personal installment loan space, which typically carries higher interest rates than traditional bank loans. While the website emphasizes flexibility and accessibility for borrowers with credit challenges, specific information about APR ranges, loan amounts, terms, and approval criteria is not disclosed on the provided pages. The company's strength lies in accessibility and willingness to work with non-prime borrowers, though potential applicants should verify current rates and terms before applying.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Willing to work with applicants who have bad credit; bad credit does not automatically disqualify you
Multiple application methods: in-person at branch, online application, or e-loan platform
Online payment service allows customers to manage loans without visiting the branch
Wheelchair-accessible location with spacious parking lot and accessible seating
Extended weekday hours (8:30 AM–5:30 PM Monday-Friday) for working customers
Serves customers from multiple surrounding towns (Baytown, Missouri City, Sugarland, Pearland, Rosenberg, Humble, Cleveland)
Licensed and regulated entities with NMLS numbers (NMLS# 2031643 and NMLS# 2029924)
cons: Only one Houston location; no multiple branch options for in-person service
No specific APR ranges, loan amount limits, or term information disclosed on website
No customer reviews visible on the website to assess borrower experiences
Personal installment loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional bank loans
Limited detail about qualification criteria, required documentation, or approval timeline
best_for: Houston-area residents with bad or challenged credit seeking emergency or large-purchase financing
Borrowers who need flexible approval and prefer in-person service options
Customers from surrounding communities (Baytown, Sugarland, Pearland, Rosenberg, etc.) who can access online platforms
People with accessibility needs requiring wheelchair-accessible facilities and parking
diagnosis: Custom Loans is best for Houston-area residents and nearby communities who have bad or challenged credit and need personal installment financing for emergencies or purchases. The main caveat is that specific terms, APR ranges, and loan limits are not disclosed on their website; prospective borrowers must call (713-741-6700) or visit in person to understand actual costs and qualification requirements.
services: Personal installment loans for emergencies and unexpected expenses
Personal installment loans for large-ticket purchases
In-person loan consultations and applications at Houston branch
Loans available to applicants with bad credit
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
